title: Classic Irish Potato Gratin
description: A rich and creamy side dish made with thinly sliced potatoes, perfect for special occasions. This Irish potato gratin is a comforting and delicious addition to any meal.

ingredients.name: magnificently, mashed
ingredients.notes: Note: This is not an ingredient, removed for clarity.

ingredients.name: gratin
ingredients.notes: Note: This is not an ingredient, removed for clarity.

instructions: Thinly slice the potatoes and set aside.
In a large skillet, sauté the onion and garlic over medium heat until softened.
Arrange a layer of potatoes in the prepared baking dish.
Sprinkle with a third of the sautéed onion and garlic mixture, followed by a third of the grated cheese.
Repeat this process two more times, ending with a layer of cheese on top.
Pour the heavy cream over the cheese.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Cover the dish with foil and bake for 30 minutes.
Remove the foil and continue baking for an additional 20-25 minutes, or until the top is golden brown and the potatoes are tender.
